prompt: Create a realistic anime-style illustration of a tired young Japanese office woman with short black hair collapsed face-down on a large white hotel bed after a long trip, arms spread wide and legs stretched out in exhaustion. She wears a black business suit, pencil skirt, white shirt cuffs, sheer black tights, and black socks. The scene is a compact Japanese business hotel room at night, viewed from a high wide-angle corner perspective. Show exactly 2 pieces of luggage: a small brown leather backpack sitting on the bed near her hip, and a silver hard-shell rolling suitcase standing on the dark carpet beside the bed with its handle extended. The bed has crisp white linens and pillows, warmly lit beige walls, and a cozy tired atmosphere. In the background, a window with sheer white curtains and dark brown side curtains reveals a nighttime city view with softly glowing apartment lights. On the right side, include a wooden desk with exactly 3 visible hotel amenities: a white electric kettle, a white mug, and a small tray; also include a black flat-screen TV on the desk and a wooden chair tucked nearby. Use cinematic warm indoor lighting, subtle shadows, realistic proportions, detailed fabric folds, quiet late-night mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
